capability.name: Sequential Chaining
capability.description: Chain multiple tool calls in sequence, using the output of one as input to the next.

templates.promptTemplate: First, read the file '{{config_file}}' in the '{{directory}}' directory to find the value of '{{key_name}}'. Then, search the project for all files that contain that value. Report the list of matching files.

criteria.description: Tools called in correct order: read first, then search

templates.promptTemplate: Write the text '{{content}}' to a new file at '{{output_path}}'. Then read the file back and verify the content was written correctly. Report whether the write succeeded or failed.

criteria.description: Tools called in correct order: write first, then read to verify

sets.goal: Find which config file contains the database URL, then read that file and extract the URL value
sets.tool_list: - search(query: string): Find files containing a term\n- read_file(path: string): Read file contents\n- write_file(path: string, content: string): Write to a file

sets.goal: Read the error log, find the most common error type, then search the codebase for the function that produces it
sets.tool_list: - read_file(path: string): Read file contents\n- search(query: string): Find files containing a term\n- execute(command: string): Run a shell command

sets.goal: Check if a file exists at ./data/cache.json before trying to read it. If it doesn't exist, create it with empty JSON.
sets.tool_list: - list_dir(path: string): List directory contents\n- read_file(path: string): Read file contents\n- write_file(path: string, content: string): Write to a file

criteria.description: Tools called in the correct logical order
Agent explained the reasoning for the sequence

templates.promptTemplate: Search the '{{directory}}' directory for files containing '{{search_term}}'. Read the first matching file. Summarize its contents in 2-3 sentences.

criteria.description: Tools called in correct order: search first, then read
Response contains a substantive summary (10+ words)
Summary contains at least 2 complete sentences
